instruction: I just made some changes to my personal site and checked out master, but now I can't find those changes. Please help me find them and merge them into master.
finalMessage:
Recovered commit `74e4785` (“Move to Stanford”) from the reflog and merged it into `master` as `cf2294d`.

- Preserved it on branch `recovered-stanford-changes`
- Resolved the biography conflict in favor of the Stanford update
- Verified clean status, merge ancestry, and no conflict markers
- Build unavailable because Bundler is not installed

trajectory.summary:
git status --short --branch && printf '
-- branches --
' && git branch -avv && printf '
-- recent reflog --
' && git reflog --date=iso -n 25 && printf '
-- graph --
' && git log --all --decorate --oneline --graph -

printf '%s
' '-- lost commit --' && git show --stat --oneline 74e4785 && git show --format=fuller --no-ext-diff 74e4785 && printf '%s
' '-- master-only commit --' && git show --stat --oneline d7d3e4b && printf '%s
' '
git branch recovered-stanford-changes 74e47856b0e14101a816735bfd27bc8f39328be7 && git merge --no-ff recovered-stanford-changes -m "Merge recovered Stanford changes" || true

git status --short --branch && git merge-base --is-ancestor 74e4785 master && echo 'recovered commit is merged' && ! git grep -nE '^(<<<<<<<|=======|>>>>>>>)' -- . ':!resources' && echo 'no conflict markers' && test "$(g
